evidence: standards/enterprise/supply-chain-legal.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Only the approved organization legal-policy authority may classify or accept a license; decisions record exact dependency/version, evidence, owner, approval, scope, expiry when applicable, and replacement or compliance plan.
statement: Every release dependency MUST have a reviewed license classification and decision from the consuming organization's approved legal policy; agents and this standard MUST NOT invent allow or deny values.
